html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

“Help Pearl find a new home! It might be tricky to find the perfect spot, but remember - she loves being near the ocean.”

-

The Hermit Rehomer can be crafted by standing near the Crabby Hermit after relocating her to the Moon Quay island (relocate her by giving her a Map of Totally Uninhabited Island). It requires 4 Cookie Cutter Shells and 4 Moon Rocks.

When holding the Hermit Rehomer, it will show projections of the Hermit Home, Hermit Bee Box, the 6 Hermit Drying Racks and some circular areas. If the following requirements are met, the player can confirm the new location and the Crabby Hermit and the related structures will be moved to that location:

  • The structures' projections have to be on land but not on deconstructable tiles such as Docks or Ice Floe
  • It cannot be placed on the Hermit Island
  • The circular projections behind the Hermit Home have to be on the ocean

Trivia

  • The Hermit Rehomer was introduced in the Hostile Takeover update.

Gallery

  • Hermit Rehomer Concept Art from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Hermit Rehomer Concept Art from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Hermit objects Teleport effect Concept Art from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Hermit Rehomer Projection in game

Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
“The crab's new home will be pitcher perfect.”
–Wilson
“What's the big deal where she lives?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang help many friend move because muscles.”
–Wolfgang
“She deserves to live in a nicer place.”
–Wendy
“CRUSTACEAN TRANSFER DEVICE”
–WX-78
“Oh dear, it's empty. I'll try again later.”
–Wickerbottom
“Wonder where to move that crab to.”
–Woodie
“Picky crab wants the perfect spot.”
–Maxwell
“The crab shall dwell where I see fit.”
–Wigfrid
“We get to help Ms. Pearl find a new home!”
–Webber
“I hope Madame Pearl will like her new home.”
–Warly
“Find crabby friend new home”
–Wormwood
“A whole movin' truck in a pitcher.”
–Winona
“It'll permit to move the hermit!”
–Wortox
“Can crabby lady live in swamp!? Florp!”
–Wurt
“I think there's a badge for helping the elderly move. But we'll do it just 'cuz, right Wobers?”
–Walter
“Where did I move her to again?”
–Wanda
“Help Pearl find a new home! It might be tricky to find the perfect spot, but remember - she loves being near the ocean.”
-
The Hermit Rehomer can be crafted by standing near the Crabby Hermit after relocating her to the Moon Quay island (relocate her by giving her a Map of Totally Uninhabited Island). It requires 4 Cookie Cutter Shells and 4 Moon Rocks.
When holding the Hermit Rehomer, it will show projections of the Hermit Home, Hermit Bee Box, the 6 Hermit Drying Racks and some circular areas. If the following requirements are met, the player can confirm the new location and the Crabby Hermit and the related structures will be moved to that location:
The structures' projections have to be on land but not on deconstructable tiles such as Docks or Ice Floe
It cannot be placed on the Hermit Island
The circular projections behind the Hermit Home have to be on the ocean
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Hermit Rehomer was introduced in the Hostile Takeover update.

{{Scrapbook Info|Help Pearl find a new home! It might be tricky to find the perfect spot, but remember - she loves being near the ocean.}}

The '''Hermit Rehomer''' can be crafted by standing near the [[Crabby Hermit]] after relocating her to the [[Moon Quay]] island (relocate her by giving her a [[Map of Totally Uninhabited Island]]). It requires 4 [[Cookie Cutter Shell|Cookie Cutter Shells]] and 4 [[Moon Rock|Moon Rocks]].

When holding the Hermit Rehomer, it will show projections of the [[Hermit Home]], [[Hermit Bee Box]], the 6 [[Hermit Drying Rack]]s and some circular areas. If the following requirements are met, the player can confirm the new location and the Crabby Hermit and the related structures will be moved to that location:
* The structures' projections have to be on land but not on deconstructable tiles such as [[Dock Kit|Docks]] or [[Ice Floe]]
* It cannot be placed on the Hermit Island
* The circular projections behind the Hermit Home have to be on the ocean

== [[File:Placeholder.png|32px|link=]] Trivia ==
* The Hermit Rehomer was introduced in the [[Hostile Takeover]] update.
